'''âw-k-h''' ('''kawakah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackeroo|jackeroo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackeroo|jackeroo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| kawakah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwakah|thiwakah]] || [[word:jiwakah|jiwakah]] || [[word:shiwakah|shiwakah]] || [[word:kiwakah|kiwakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwakah|thuthuwakah]] || [[word:jujuwakah|jujuwakah]] || [[word:shushuwakah|shushuwakah]] || [[word:kukuwakah|kukuwakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwakah|thuwakah]] || [[word:juwakah|juwakah]] || [[word:shuwakah|shuwakah]] || [[word:kuwakah|kuwakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwakah|thuwakah]] || [[word:juwakah|juwakah]] || [[word:shuwakah|shuwakah]] || [[word:kuwakah|kuwakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewakah|thewakah]] || [[word:jewakah|jewakah]] || [[word:shewakah|shewakah]] || [[word:kewakah|kewakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowakah|thothowakah]] || [[word:jojowakah|jojowakah]] || [[word:shoshowakah|shoshowakah]] || [[word:kokowakah|kokowakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakah|thowakah]] || [[word:jowakah|jowakah]] || [[word:showakah|showakah]] || [[word:kowakah|kowakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakah|thowakah]] || [[word:jowakah|jowakah]] || [[word:showakah|showakah]] || [[word:kowakah|kowakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwakah|thĂŠwakah]] || [[word:jĂŠwakah|jĂŠwakah]] || [[word:shĂŠwakah|shĂŠwakah]] || [[word:kĂŠwakah|kĂŠwakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawakah|thathawakah]] || [[word:jajawakah|jajawakah]] || [[word:shashawakah|shashawakah]] || [[word:kakawakah|kakawakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawakah|thawakah]] || [[word:jawakah|jawakah]] || [[word:shawakah|shawakah]] || [[word:kawakah|kawakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawakah|thawakah]] || [[word:jawakah|jawakah]] || [[word:shawakah|shawakah]] || [[word:kawakah|kawakah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawakah|shawakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawakah|goshawakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawakah|gokishawakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawakahnĂŒ|shawakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawakahnknĂŒ|goshawakahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakahnĂŒ|gokishawakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawakahshĂ«|shawakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawakahnkshĂ«|goshawakahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawakahshĂ«|gokishawakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakahro|shawakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakahnkro|goshawakahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakahro|gokishawakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakahmu|shawakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakahnkmu|goshawakahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakahmu|gokishawakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawakahsher|shawakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawakahnksher|goshawakahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawakahsher|gokishawakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawakahng|shawakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawakahnkng|goshawakahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawakahng|gokishawakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawakahya|shawakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawakahnkya|goshawakahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawakahya|gokishawakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawakahyam|shawakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawakahnkyam|goshawakahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawakahyam|gokishawakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakahnĂŒshĂ«|shawakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawakahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakahnĂŒro|shawakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakahnknĂŒro|goshawakahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakahnĂŒro|gokishawakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakahnĂŒmu|shawakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakahnknĂŒmu|goshawakahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakahnĂŒmu|gokishawakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakahshĂ«nĂŒ|shawakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakahshĂ«ro|shawakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakahnkshĂ«ro|goshawakahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakahshĂ«ro|gokishawakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakahshĂ«mu|shawakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakahnkshĂ«mu|goshawakahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakahshĂ«mu|gokishawakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakahronĂŒ|shawakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakahnkronĂŒ|goshawakahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakahronĂŒ|gokishawakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakahroshĂ«|shawakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakahnkroshĂ«|goshawakahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakahroshĂ«|gokishawakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakahromu|shawakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakahnkromu|goshawakahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakahromu|gokishawakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakahmunĂŒ|shawakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakahnkmunĂŒ|goshawakahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakahmunĂŒ|gokishawakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakahmushĂ«|shawakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakahnkmushĂ«|goshawakahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakahmushĂ«|gokishawakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakahmuro|shawakahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakahnkmuro|goshawakahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakahmuro|gokishawakahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
